calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Feb-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT WILLIE MCGARY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: GRANTED; service is defective. Defendant shall have its answer on file within 10 days from notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Yvonne Lee.
Bari S. Robinson, Esq. for Plaintiff: Karen Elizabeth McCoy, present, was sworn and examined.
Plaintiff's expert witness: Thomas Arthur Anderberg, was sworn and direct examined.
Plaintiff's request to amend and correct the spelling of Defendant's name to Willie Mcgary, is granted.
After hearing the evidence presented, testimony of the expert witness, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Willie McGary as follows:
Principal $105,014.14
Attorney's Fees $10,650.00
Costs $539.00 for a total of $116,203.14
Judgment signed in open court.
